name: @fairmint/open-captable-protocol-daml-js
description: Open CapTable Protocol DAML smart contracts with generated JavaScript bindings.
author: Fairmint

scripts.build: tsx scripts/codegen/generate-captable.ts && cd Test && PATH="$HOME/.dpm/bin:$PATH" dpm build
scripts.clean: for pkg in Shared OpenCapTableReports-v01 OpenCapTable-v31 OpenCapTableProofOfOwnership-v01 CantonPayments CouponMinter Test; do (cd $pkg && PATH="$HOME/.dpm/bin:$PATH" dpm clean); done
scripts.codegen: npm run build && cd OpenCapTable-v31 && PATH="$HOME/.dpm/bin:$PATH" dpm codegen-js && cd .. && cd Shared && PATH="$HOME/.dpm/bin:$PATH" dpm codegen-js && cd .. && cd OpenCapTableReports-v01 && PATH="$HOME/.dpm/bin:$PATH" dpm codegen-js && cd .. && cd CantonPayments && PATH="$HOME/.dpm/bin:$PATH" dpm codegen-js && cd .. && tsx scripts/bundle-dependencies.ts && tsx scripts/create-package-index.ts && tsx scripts/create-root-index.ts && tsx scripts/fix-splice-refs.ts && npm run build:ts
scripts.create-factory:ocp: npm run codegen && tsx scripts/create-ocp-factory.ts --network devnet && tsx scripts/create-ocp-factory.ts --network mainnet
scripts.create-factory:paymentStreams: npm run codegen && tsx scripts/create-paymentStreams-factory.ts --network devnet && tsx scripts/create-paymentStreams-factory.ts --network mainnet
scripts.create-factory:reports: npm run codegen && tsx scripts/create-reports-factory.ts --network devnet && tsx scripts/create-reports-factory.ts --network mainnet
scripts.fix: npm run lint:fix && npm run format:fix
scripts.lint:daml: EXIT_CODE=0; for pkg in OpenCapTable-v31 CantonPayments OpenCapTableReports-v01 OpenCapTableProofOfOwnership-v01 Shared CouponMinter Test; do echo "Linting $pkg..."; (cd $pkg && PATH="$HOME/.dpm/bin:$PATH" dpm damlc lint) || EXIT_CODE=1; done; exit $EXIT_CODE
scripts.package:manifest: npm run package:prep && npm pack --dry-run --json --ignore-scripts > /tmp/npm-pack.json 2>/dev/null && jq -r '.[0].files[].path' /tmp/npm-pack.json | sort | tsx scripts/collapse-manifest.ts > generated/npm-manifest.txt
scripts.package:prep: npm run codegen && npm run update-version && tsx scripts/bundle-dependencies.ts && tsx scripts/create-package-index.ts && tsx scripts/create-root-index.ts && tsx scripts/fix-splice-refs.ts
scripts.test: cd Test && PATH="$HOME/.dpm/bin:$PATH" dpm test --show-coverage --color --coverage-ignore-choice splice-amulet:.*
